summary: Wrapper defaults should stay transparent: pure MCP config delegation, executable pipx upgrades, stable skill-name delegation, visible dry-run upgrade intent, value-form flag detection, and printed root errors.
reason: The companion must remain predictable for agents: it should not inject undocumented MCP arguments, punt explicit pipx upgrade execution, drop the required AgentPool skill name when flags are supplied, silently ignore install preview flags, duplicate passthrough flags supplied as --flag=value, or hide Cobra/root errors.
validated_outcome: `go test ./...` verifies flag detection, MCP argument construction, pipx upgrade invocation, skill-name preservation, and root error-print filtering.
